MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF CHARLES MEYER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: CONTINUED TO 1/21/05 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-19-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: BRENDA CRUZ KEITH FOR PLAINTIFF CHARLES O MEYER
DEFENDANT DAVID BENITAH IN PRO PER

SETTLMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE TO REMAIN. TERMS OF STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PLANITIFF ENTITLED TO POSSESSION OF 737 PINE STREET GARAGE, SPACE #8 AND # D.
DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $1200 AND SURRENDER POSSESSION BY DELIVERING PAYMENT AND GARAGE DOOR GENIE TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY AT 1965 MARKET STREET, 2ND FLOOR, BY 5PM 1/21/05. PAYMENT TO BE MADE BY CERTIFIED CHECK OR MONEY ORDER PAYABLE TO CHARLES O MEYERS. DEFENDANT TO LEAVE SPACES EMPTY, NO PERSONAL PROPERTY OR GARBAGE.
IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES, HE MAY HAVE JUDGMENT SHOWING PLAINITFF TAKES NOTHING, ONLY.
IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT COMPLY, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR POSSESSION OF 737 PINE STREET GARAGE, SPACE #8 AND # D; $1200 DAMAGES AND COSTS.
THERE IS A PENDING MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AT 9:30AM FRIDAY 1/21/05 IN DEPT 301. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL WILL CONTINUE THAT MOTION TO MONDAY 1/24.
TRIAL DATE OF 1/24 TO REMAIN. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY WILL APPEAR ON THAT DATE.

JUDGE PRO TEM:JASON JUNGRES; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; BOB BALIAN (218)

RULING:
A R G U E D. Supplemental brief filed by Defendant on 11/29/04 is received by the Court. The Court adopts its Tentative Ruling: DEFENDANT DAVID BENITAH'S Motion To Strike: DENIED; 5 day leave to file an answer. Order signed. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
